testcase.name: test_edit_permissions_persist

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 200 == 403 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code + where <Response [200]> = <function get at 0xfb9e9b196c00>('https://cargo-command-58.preview.emergentagent.com/api/clients', headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI2YTViYzllMGNiNTNhYzJkMmExMWU3YWMiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImNybXRlc3RAZXhkLmNvbSIsImV4cCI6MTc4NTAwNTE1MywidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.6mA_o2Hk6BTsYUn1hRgPQRIJvNFsKwi3mnGXeve8ekM'}) + where <function get at 0xfb9e9b196c00> = requests.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rbac.py:130: in test_edit_permissions_persist assert requests.get(f"{API}/clients", headers=sh).status_code == 403 E AssertionError: assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code E + where <Response [200]> = <function get at 0xfb9e9b196c00>('https://cargo-command-58.preview.emergentagent.com/api/clients', headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI2YTViYzllMGNiNTNhYzJkMmExMWU3YWMiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImNybXRlc3RAZXhkLmNvbSIsImV4cCI6MTc4NTAwNTE1MywidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.6mA_o2Hk6BTsYUn1hRgPQRIJvNFsKwi3mnGXeve8ekM'}) E + where <function get at 0xfb9e9b196c00> = requests.get
